tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: I have included all vocal lines, the chords are marked and all variations of verses in two part fingerstyle writing.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
[ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G/B[/ch]
  I can feel the magic floating in the air[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G/B[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  being with you gets me that way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]
  I watch the sunlight dance across your face[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
and I've never been this swept away[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
  All my thoughts just seem to settle on the breeze[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  when I'm lyin' wrapped up in your arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]
  The whole world just fades away, the only thing[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am7[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]    
I hear is the beating of your heart [/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Cause I can feel you breathe, it's washing over me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]D7sus4[/ch] 
And suddenly, I'm melting into you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
There's nothing left to prove[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]D7sus4[/ch] 
Baby, all we need is just to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Caught up in the touch, slow and steady rush[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D7sus4[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] 
Baby, isn't that the way that love's supposed to be?[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7sus4[/ch]
I can feel you breathe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Just breathe[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
  In a way, I know my heart is waking up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    
  As all the walls come tumbling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Closer than I've ever felt before[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G/B[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
And I know, and you know[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
There's no need for words right now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Cause I can feel you breathe, it's washing over me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]D7sus4[/ch] 
And suddenly, I'm melting into you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
There's nothing left to prove[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  
Baby, all we need is just to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
  Caught up in the touch, slow and steady rush[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D7sus4[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] 
Baby, isn't that the way that love's supposed to be?[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7sus4[/ch]
I can feel you breathe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Just breathe[/tab]


[tab][ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
  Caught up in the touch, slow and steady rush[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D7sus4[/ch]
Baby, isn't that the way that love's supposed to be?[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7sus4[/ch]
I can feel you breathe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
Just breathe[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]
  I can feel the magic floating in the air[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  Being with you gets me that way[/tab]
